product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm really interested in them. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. The retail price for these headphones is $399, but I can offer them to you at a special price of $350. Let me know if you'd like to proceed with this offer.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! I appreciate the discount, but my budget is $220, so I won't be able to proceed with this offer.
